lineage.Process: FeatureClassToFeatureClass "Database Connections\Connection to sun-gis10.sde\CENSUS.sdeStat_publish" D:\census2008\תוצרים\carto_p.mdb sdeStat_publish # "YISHUV_STAT08 'אזור סטטיסטי מלא 2008' true true false 4 Long 0 10 ,First,#,Database Connections\Connection to sun-gis10.sde\CENSUS.sdeStat_publish,YISHUV_STAT08,-1,-1;STAT08 'אזור סטטיסטי 2008' true true false 2 Short 0 5 ,First,#,Database Connections\Connection to sun-gis10.sde\CENSUS.sdeStat_publish,STAT08,-1,-1;ROVA 'רובע' true true false 2 Short 0 5 ,First,#,Database Connections\Connection to sun-gis10.sde\CENSUS.sdeStat_publish,ROVA,-1,-1;TATROVA 'תת רובע' true true false 2 Short 0 5 ,First,#,Database Connections\Connection to sun-gis10.sde\CENSUS.sdeStat_publish,TATROVA,-1,-1;RELTYPE 'סיווג דת' true true false 2 Short 0 5 ,First,#,Database Connections\Connection to sun-gis10.sde\CENSUS.sdeStat_publish,RELTYPE,-1,-1;SEMEL_YISHUV 'סמל יישוב' true true false 4 Long 0 10 ,First,#,Database Connections\Connection to sun-gis10.sde\CENSUS.sdeStat_publish,SEMEL_YISHUV,-1,-1;SUGUCHLOSYASTAT 'סוג אוכלוסיה לא"ס' true true false 2 Short 0 5 ,First,#,Database Connections\Connection to sun-gis10.sde\CENSUS.sdeStat_publish,SUGUCHLOSYASTAT,-1,-1;SHAPE_AREA 'SHAPE_AREA' false false true 0 Double 0 0 ,First,#,Database Connections\Connection to sun-gis10.sde\CENSUS.sdeStat_publish,SHAPE.AREA,-1,-1;SHAPE_LEN 'SHAPE_LEN' false false true 0 Double 0 0 ,First,#,Database Connections\Connection to sun-gis10.sde\CENSUS.sdeStat_publish,SHAPE.LEN,-1,-1" # D:\census2008\תוצרים\carto_p.mdb\sdeStat_publish

FeatureClassToFeatureClass "Database Connections\Connection to sun-gis10 (censusp).sde\CENSUS_P.sdeTatRova2008_p" D:\census2008\תוצרים\census_p.mdb sdeTatRova2008_p # "ROVA 'רובע' true true false 2 Short 0 5 ,First,#,Database Connections\Connection to sun-gis10 (censusp).sde\CENSUS_P.sdeTatRova2008_p,ROVA,-1,-1;TATROVA 'תת רובע' true true false 2 Short 0 5 ,First,#,Database Connections\Connection to sun-gis10 (censusp).sde\CENSUS_P.sdeTatRova2008_p,TATROVA,-1,-1;SEMEL_YISHUV 'סמל יישוב' true true false 4 Long 0 10 ,First,#,Database Connections\Connection to sun-gis10 (censusp).sde\CENSUS_P.sdeTatRova2008_p,SEMEL_YISHUV,-1,-1;SHAPE_AREA 'SHAPE_AREA' false false true 0 Double 0 0 ,First,#,Database Connections\Connection to sun-gis10 (censusp).sde\CENSUS_P.sdeTatRova2008_p,SHAPE.AREA,-1,-1;SHAPE_LEN 'SHAPE_LEN' false false true 0 Double 0 0 ,First,#,Database Connections\Connection to sun-gis10 (censusp).sde\CENSUS_P.sdeTatRova2008_p,SHAPE.LEN,-1,-1" # D:\census2008\תוצרים\census_p.mdb\sdeTatRova2008_p

citeinfo.origin: REQUIRED: The name of an organization or individual that developed the data set.
citeinfo.pubdate: REQUIRED: The date when the data set is published or otherwise made available for release.
citeinfo.title: TatRova_for_census2008

idinfo.native: Microsoft Windows XP Version 5.1 (Build 2600) Service Pack 3; ESRI ArcCatalog 9.3.1.3000

descript.abstract: REQUIRED: A brief narrative summary of the data set.
descript.purpose: REQUIRED: A summary of the intentions with which the data set was developed.

timeperd.current: REQUIRED: The basis on which the time period of content information is determined.

sngdate.caldate: REQUIRED: The year (and optionally month, or month and day) for which the data set corresponds to the ground.

status.progress: REQUIRED: The state of the data set.
status.update: REQUIRED: The frequency with which changes and additions are made to the data set after the initial data set is completed.

theme.themekt: REQUIRED: Reference to a formally registered thesaurus or a similar authoritative source of theme keywords.
theme.themekey: REQUIRED: Common-use word or phrase used to describe the subject of the data set.

idinfo.accconst: REQUIRED: Restrictions and legal prerequisites for accessing the data set.
idinfo.useconst: REQUIRED: Restrictions and legal prerequisites for using the data set after access is granted.

dataIdInfo.envirDesc: Microsoft Windows XP Version 5.1 (Build 2600) Service Pack 3; ESRI ArcCatalog 9.3.1.3000

metainfo.metstdn: FGDC Content Standards for Digital Geospatial Metadata

cntorgp.cntper: REQUIRED: The person responsible for the metadata information.
cntorgp.cntorg: REQUIRED: The organization responsible for the metadata information.

cntaddr.addrtype: REQUIRED: The mailing and/or physical address for the organization or individual.
cntaddr.city: REQUIRED: The city of the address.
cntaddr.state: REQUIRED: The state or province of the address.
cntaddr.postal: REQUIRED: The ZIP or other postal code of the address.

cntinfo.cntvoice: REQUIRED: The telephone number by which individuals can speak to the organization or individual.

altsys.altenc: Explicit elevation coordinate included with horizontal coordinates

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
